#HorseDrawSireDIWt JockeyTrainer RPRTSForm ScoreModel %Fair Adj Best Edge
1 Seven Fires (IRE) ↑ ⚡GS 3 ·· Sioux Nation / Dandy Man 2.5 9-8 (-8) George Bass Jack Channon 86 71 4-311 59.4 35.6% 2.8 3.7 3.25 -4.1pp
📰 4yo who only made her debut in December and was off the mark on third start when making all to beat ten others in Newcastle maiden (6f) in February; dropped to 5f and had more in hand than the margin suggests when narrowly winning her first handicap here (first-time tongue-tie) last month; handicapper could only put 1lb on her back and she's of firm interest returned to 6f in the hat-trick bid.
🧠 Model's top pick. Rated around the field average (RPR 86, TS 71); strong recent form, on an improving trajectory; going conditions are ideal, fast breaker from the stalls; good course record; significant steamer today (4/1 → 5/2, 38% shorter); market price confirms model confidence.
2 Zighy (IRE) ⚡GS 6 ·· Mehmas / Cape Cross ▼ 1.1 9-1 (-15) Jack Callan(5) George Boughey 80 45 23221- 54.7 17.3% 5.8 5.5 7.00 +3.9pp
📰 Placed on her first four starts and put it all together when taking Wolverhampton novice (6f, Tapeta) in November; may have more to offer this term and she's respected on this reappearance and handicap debut.
🧠 Main danger. Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; strong recent form; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Mehmas), going conditions are ideal, well-handicapped at the weights; in-form trainer (George Boughey).
3 Moonlight Mirage (GB) 🐌GS 4 ·· Acclamation / Muhaarar ▼ 0.4 9-3 (-13) Daniel Muscutt David Loughnane 78 68 41663- 53.1 13.4% 7.5 8.2 9.50 +1.7pp
📰 Built on promising debut (6f, good) in August when landing Wolverhampton novice (Tapeta) three weeks later; back in that form when third in course handicap (also 5f) on final start for George Scott in October and sold for 17,000gns five days later; unexposed, particularly at this trip, and impossible to rule out on this stable/seasonal debut.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Acclamation), going conditions are ideal, well-handicapped at the weights; good course record.
4 Powdering ↑ 7 ·· Ribchester / Acclamation 1.6 10-2 Dylan Hogan Michael Herrington 83 57 6-6920 50.2 8.7% 11.5 13.7 6.50 -8.1pp
📰 C&D winner who last scored at Kempton (6f) off this mark in September; just edged out at Lingfield (7f, also Polytrack) on penultimate start and finishing last in a classy Newcastle handicap on Good Friday can be glossed over; not without a chance.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; fast breaker from the stalls; good course record; significant steamer today (17/2 → 11/2, 35% shorter).
5 Barefoot Beach ↓↓ ⚡GS 5 ·· Kodi Bear / Acclamation 3.0 9-9 (-7) Joe Leavy Richard Hannon 75 48 1-2 50.1 8.5% 11.8 13.7 7.00 -7.0pp
📰 Possibly significant she was declared to make her debut at Glorious Goodwood in July (non-runner) and scored at 25-1 when finally given the go ahead at Kempton (6f, Polytrack) in September; positives to take from last month's returning second over that C&D, despite the odds-on reversal, and she carries plenty of potential into this handicap debut.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; strong recent form; fast breaker from the stalls; drifting in the market (11/4 → 7/1, 155% longer).
6 Fantasy Obsessor (GB) 8 ·· Mayson / Due Diligence 3.0 9-7 (-9) Harry Davies Michael Appleby 85 38 16099- 47.9 6.1% 16.4 15.4 10.00 -3.5pp
📰 14-1 but she scored on her introduction over C&D in June and defied a penalty in Chelmsford novice (7f, Polytrack) the following month; reverse thrust firmly engaged after that and she didn't beat a rival on her last two starts of 2025; however, she's become attractively weighted and needs a market check ahead of this comeback.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; going conditions are ideal, fast breaker from the stalls; good course record.
7 Addarella ⚡GS 2 ·· Earthlight / Motivator ▼ 0.9 9-11 (-5) Kieran O'Neill Scott Dixon 80 57 -61287 47.2 5.5% 18.3 15.4 34.00 +3.6pp
📰 Couldn't build on good 6f Wolverhampton record when beaten 10l over that C&D on Friday; has some form here too but she's not easy to recommend after that.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; fit and race-ready; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Earthlight), fast breaker from the stalls; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
8 Chicory (GB) ↓ 1 ·· Ardad / Pivotal ▼ 2.4 9-8 (-8) George Downing Ed Walker 76 52 5170- 46.5 4.9% 20.6 26.6 5.50 -14.4pp
📰 All starts at 6f; won August Newbury maiden (good; form worked out) on her second start and highly tried in two subsequent runs, when down the field in Polytrack Group 3 and Newmarket Listed event; drops in grade for this seasonal/handicap debut and very interesting to see how she goes in the market.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; modest recent form, on an improving trajectory; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Ardad); in-form trainer (Ed Walker).

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sea The Stars colt who cost 900,000euros as a yearling; close second at Haydock (1m) and justified favouritism from the front at Goodwood (1m1f, good) where he drew clear to win by 5l; represents the powerful Appleby/Buick team and looks a useful prospect; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "edge": "-6.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ballydoyle colt who gained his maiden win at Glorious Goodwood then had a couple of French assignments, finishing fifth in a valuable conditions race at Longchamp (form has substance) and good fourth in the Criterium de Saint-Cloud (1m2f Group 1); leading player on the figures."
      },

        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "8.27",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sea The Stars colt who cost 510,000gns as a yearling; had his rivals strung out like jumpers en route to an impressive performance at Newcastle (1m, AW) in March when he scored by 14l with a further 9l back to the third; interesting contender who brings major potential to this higher grade."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Twice-raced colt who is brother to a Group 2 winner for his owner and seems likely to improve further; second at Sandown (7f) and went one better at York (1m, good) where he held on by a neck from a rival who subsequently ran well in Group 3; possibilities."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "11.66",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten long way in Saudi Arabia in sole outing this year; 3-4 on home soil and made all for a clearcut success in Listed event at Pontefract (1m, soft) the final time; probably needs to resume that progress to defy a 3lb penalty in this rather deeper race for the grade."
      },

        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended last season at the top of his game, going very close in a 1m2f nursery at Newmarket and a 1m1f Group 3 at Chantilly; has raced nine times already, however, and isn't sure to progress much further this term."
      },

        "spotlight": "Record of 3-6 last term featured a Listed win (1m) on French soil, which followed a good effort in nursery at the York Ebor festival; failed to get home over 1m2f at Saint-Cloud final start; this looks a stiff task under 3lb penalty returned to domestic duty."
      }

        "spotlight": "Likes soft ground and won off 9lb lower on her final start for John O'Donoghue at Navan (1m2f, soft) last April; holds a leading chance now after a good effort on seasonal/stable debut over 1m at the Curragh; met trouble in running, and her performance can be upgraded."

        "spotlight": "A long time since he showed his best form; the most recent of his two wins was in 2023; this season's two Curragh runs provide no encouragement; held by Mr Rango."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time winner at 1m2f on soft or heavy; last success was in this race two years ago for a different stable; only flashes of form last season but interesting now off 10lb lower than last winning mark; out of his depth in the Irish Lincoln before showing signs of a return to form with a good run over 1m4f at the Curragh."

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "15:00",
    "race_name": "Betway Earl Of Sefton Stakes (Group 3)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m1f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Boiling Point (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "117",
        "rpr": "131",
        "or": "114",
        "form": "5421-4",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "67.5",
        "model_pct": "27.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.59",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can lead and goes well here, as he showed again when defying top-weight in the Cambridgeshire handicap over C&D (good to firm) in September; left the impression the run was just needed and/or the trip stretched him when close fourth of five in Winter Derby at Lingfield (1m2f, AW) in February; a bold bid is very much on the cards."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Damysus (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "118",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "32011-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Rahy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "67.3",
        "model_pct": "27.5%",
        "fair_odds": "3.63",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-17.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third in good-ground Sandown Classic Trial and second in Group 2 Dante at York (good to firm) last spring; finished last in the Derby but firmly back on track when landing a 1m2f Listed race at Deauville (good to soft) in August and signed off with Group 3 C&D win in October; carries 3lb penalty but holds a Group 1 Lockinge Stakes entry and he's the sort to kick on again this year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Skukuza",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "107",
        "rpr": "126",
        "or": "111",
        "form": "343-45",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Trippi",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "63.4",
        "model_pct": "18.6%",
        "fair_odds": "5.38",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a valuable Curragh handicap last May and impressed in a Listed win there (also 1m, good) the following month; again had Ryan Moore riding when he looked a shade unlucky in York Group 3 (1m1f, good to firm) in August; finished last year with good efforts in Group 2s at Leopardstown and Longchamp; back in that sort of form when close fifth in Saint-Cloud Group 3 (1m, soft) 17 days ago and he's a likely player with Moore retaking the reins."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Persica (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "114",
        "rpr": "129",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "15608-",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "61.1",
        "model_pct": "14.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.80",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had Ryan Moore on board when winning this race (good to soft) last year and produced another big effort for that rider when landing similar event at Epsom (good) in June; didn't match that form subsequently but has been gelded and no surprise if he goes well in the bid to retain his crown under Oisin Murphy this time; entered in Group 1 Lockinge Stakes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "King's Gambit (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "111",
        "form": "46352-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Storm Cat",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "15.02",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No wins in nine Group/Listed races since landing the London Gold Cup at Newbury on his seasonal/handicap debut in 2024; frequently ran well, though, albeit with this trip looking a bare minimum when fifth of eight in York Group 3 in August on his penultimate start; can't be confidently ruled out but will need to resume in top order to make his Group-race breakthrough."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Prague (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jack Gilligan",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "109",
        "rpr": "122",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "55405-",
        "sire": "Galileo",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.48",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Announced himself when winning Group 2 here (1m, soft) in September 2024 but 0-8 since and he's become a little tricky to place; had wind surgery in December, which might help, but he's at the bottom of the list on RPRs."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",

    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "The Lion In Winter (IRE)",

        "ts": "110",

        "fair_odds": "5.85",
        "best_dec": "2.20",
        "edge": "-27.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Impressed in a Curragh maiden and the Group 3 Acomb Stakes at two; failed to win in a high-profile campaign last year; flopped in the Dante and the Derby; redeemed himself with smart placed form in 1m Gr 1s at Longchamp/Ascot and in the Breeders' Cup Mile; never threatened in Hong Kong Mile; easy ground a worry, though he ran well on soft in the Prix Jean Prat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Mutasarref (GB)",

        "trainer": "G M Lyons",

        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "63.5",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.70",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten victories include four here, most notably twice at Group 3 level in 2024; not quite at the same level this year but solid form, most recently seasonal-best when getting up late for second in Group 2 Solonaway Stakes at the Curragh."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Tokenomics (FR)",
        "jockey": "Luke McAteer",
        "trainer": "David Marnane",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "103",

        "dam_sire": "Elusive City",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "61.7",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.01",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five career wins, the most recent off 98 in a 1m handicap at Dundalk last November; should strip fitter following an AW run in February; stable in fine form, combined for a Dundalk treble last week."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Mississippi River (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Gavin Ryan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "12451-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Distorted Humor",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "59.3",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.14",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent in handicaps and conditions races at around 1m/1m1f last season; only once out of the first four in his nine 2024 starts, three wins, including over C&D; has never run in a stakes race and will need to raise his game to score at this level."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Jancis (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "W McCreery",
        "ts": "109",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "55462-",

        "dam_sire": "Ruler Of The World",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.49",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 7f Group 3 at this venue in 2024; form last season included fifth in 1m Group 2 and 1m2f Group 1 events at the Curragh before fourth in Group 3 at Ascot; last of six in C&D Group 3 last August; good effort when second in a 1m Listed race at Dundalk before a winter break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Expanded (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "2/996-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.45",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2024 Dewhurst runner-up on soft; ran way below that level in two Guineas attempts on better ground last spring; faded after showing up early at Newmarket, always behind at the Curragh after a slow start; failed to run to expectations when unplaced favourite for a C&D Listed race last September."
      },
      {

        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.61",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Superb pedigree; landed the odds on debut in C&D  fillies' maiden early last season; failed to run to expectations in 1m2f Group 3 event at Navan in May; fair third in a Listed race at Gowran in August; satisfactory display in fourth in the Blandford Stakes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Ribee",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "Michael Mulvany",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "11-152",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "19.91",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a terrific spell last October, notching three wins and two places during a hectic spell; maintained his rate of improvement when beating 24 rivals in the Irish Lincoln on return; not as effective over an extended 1m2f in a Listed race at Naas; back to form quickly to take second in a 1m2f premier handicap at the Curragh; this is probably closer to his optimum trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Lord Massusus",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "Joseph G Murphy",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "5529-8",
        "sire": "Markaz",
        "dam_sire": "Haafhd",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.09",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seven career wins include this race last season, when he got up in the last strides to deny the odds-on favourite Mutasarref; produced his best subsequent effort when fourth in the Minstrel Stakes at the Curragh last July; dropped away tamely in the 7f Gladness Stakes at the Curragh on seasonal debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Norwalk Havoc",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "210-78",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "50.8",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.32",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time winner at 7f/1m, including two late-season Listed events at this venue on heavy ground; returned with fair seventh of 25 behind Ribee in the Irish Lincoln; appeared not to stay 1m2f in another premier handicap at the Curragh on latest"
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Cowardofthecounty",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "9/590-",

        "fair_odds": "26.41",

        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 7f Group 3 event at Deauville in 2024; tried at Group 1 level after; struggled in three runs last season; tongue-tied for seasonal debut; best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed all three starts before a recent AW maiden win; this is highly ambitious for a 75-rated filly making her turf debut."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Purchased for 60,000gns from Charlie Appleby last July and looked very useful when landing 5f handicaps at Haydock (good) and Hamilton (soft) for Ed Bethell in the autumn; only had five career starts so it'll be a surprise if there isn't more to come this year; leading claims with the stable among the winners."
      },

        "fair_odds": "7.44",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Good form in York sprints last summer; no more than respectable efforts in two AW outings this winter but feasibly treated on those York efforts if a return to turf sparks a revival."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Successful over 5f at Chester (5f, good) last July; also went close on his 2025 reappearance which provides hope that he may be ready to roll after seven months off; drawn widest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Better than ever last autumn, winning 5f handicaps at Leicester (good to soft) and Doncaster (heavy); creditable fourth (Duran second) in this race on his 2025 reappearance; likely to be competitive from a handy draw."
      },

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reacted well to a belated switch to AW at the end of 2025, winning twice over 5f at Newcastle; behind Sports Coach back there last month but it was his first outing for 104 days so he could be sharper now."
      },
      {

        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Prominent racer who notched two 5f wins last year, including a defeat of Sunday's Musselburgh scorer Montezuma at Musselburgh (5f, good to soft) in September; not so good on final two starts but he's still relatively lightly raced as a sprinter and appeals as one who could resume his progression at some point in 2026."
      },
      {

        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built on his Southwell reappearance second when seeing off five rivals back there (5f) three weeks later; respectable fifth of 12 in a competitive race at Newcastle (5f) since; while his peak RPRs have been achieved on AW he was placed at Redcar last summer and it's too soon to suggest he won't prove fully effective on the grass; could have fitness edge over some."
      },

        "spotlight": "Pushed the reopposing Smart Vision close at Doncaster last autumn; started last season well (including second in this race on reappearance) and should be on the premises if resuming in similar form."

      }

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",

    "runners": [
      {

        "edge": "-4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3,700,000gns yearling; half-sister to a Fillies' Mile winner; favourite for C&D maidens last autumn, finishing third behind Mubasimah then responding to pressure to get the job done (on good ground) next time, despite still seeming green; a potential Group filly, given her profile, and commands respect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Beautify (IRE)",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "65.0",

        "fair_odds": "7.71",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Form dipped in the Cheveley Park Stakes here but she may well rebound and resume the progress shown at the Curragh, where she won a Group 2 and was a close second in 7f Group 1 behind a stablemate who is currently favourite for the 1,000 Guineas; remains of interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did well over 6f (on good/firmer) last season, scoring by a wide margin at Haydock before on the premises in the Lowther (Group 2) at York and Cheveley Park Stakes (Group 1) at Newmarket; one of the main form contenders in this first 7f attempt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "rpr": "116",

        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Group form last summer comprised a success over 6f at Ascot flanked by good efforts at Royal Ascot and Deauville (7f); took a good hold and weakened in the Cheveley Park Stakes, suggesting she may not be crying out for this step back up in trip."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Night Of Thunder filly who cost 640,000euros as a yearling; beat a reasonably solid yardstick by half a length, pair clear, in 7f AW event at Kempton four months ago; stable has landed this prize six times, most recently last year; promising contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.9pp",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel filly who posted a couple of sound front-running performances over C&D last autumn, winning a maiden event (good to firm) and a rallying second in the Oh So Sharp Stakes (Group 3; good ground); open to further improvement and has clear possibilities, especially if again able to dominate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Below par in sole start on softer than good; 2yo form otherwise featured a 6f maiden win and two good efforts at Group level, namely second in the Albany at Royal Ascot and fourth in the Rockfel over C&D; could go well."
      },

        "rank": 8,

      },

      },

        "rank": 10,

        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not disgraced in Listed event at Newmarket (6f) on final 2yo start but remains possibly flattered by the figure she appeared to record here when sixth in the Cheveley Park Stakes and, on balance, faces a difficult task in this field."
      },

        "fair_odds": "28.21",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Broadly progressive 6f form last season culminated in her second in Listed contest at Newmarket (good) when doing well considering she took a good hold and had to wait for a run; ideally needs to settle better upped in distance and this is a harder task."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "fair_odds": "42.27",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won well at Southwell (6f, AW) to open her account at the fifth attempt but looks highly unlikely to follow up, being towards the bottom of this pack on bare figures and a filly who has no obvious Group potential."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept to the Newmarket tracks last year and steadily got the hang of things, belying 50-1 odds with close second in C&D novice the final time; faces a much stiffer task upped in class and is the only maiden in this field."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Beverley",
    "time": "16:00",
    "race_name": "140th Year Of The Watt Memorial Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "2m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Anniversary",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "/85-55",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Slickly",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "59.8",
        "model_pct": "35.2%",
        "fair_odds": "2.84",
        "best_dec": "1.73",
        "edge": "-31.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4yo who has had only seven races; can race freely but there's still a feeling he could have a bigger performance in him and he shaped quite well under a change of tactics (went from the front) when 4l fifth of nine in the Queen's Prize at Kempton (2m, AW) 18 days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sax Appeal",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "-25738",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "29.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.38",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "+3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Prominent racer who posted four wins in the second half of last year, including a C&D defeat of Charging Thunder on good; suffered a heavy defeat on AW last time but it was in a strong Good Friday race at Newcastle and Charging Thunder was once again behind him; a bold show seems likely in these much calmer waters back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Charging Thunder",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(5)",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "06-750",
        "sire": "War Command",
        "dam_sire": "Storming Home",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "17.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.76",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second to Sax Appeal over C&D and successful over 1m6f at Wolverhampton (both off 2lb higher than today) last July; it's hard to be enthused by his more recent efforts, including well held at Newcastle on Good Friday, but this is a much less competitive scenario."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Elysian Flame (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Samantha & Jacqueline Coward",
        "ts": "32",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "3/5/4-",
        "sire": "Champs Elysees",
        "dam_sire": "Halling",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "45.8",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.47",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Developed into a pretty smart staying handicapper on the Flat for Mick and David Easterby in 2021, finishing third in 2m4f handicaps at Royal Ascot and Glorious Goodwood; respectable fifth of 32 in the Cesarewitch at Newmarket (2m2f) in October of that year but not seen again until fourth of six at Ayr (1m5f, good to soft) last September; there was enough in that to suggest he retains ability but he's been absent for another seven months and isn't the easiest to assess."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Wahraan (FR)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Jessica Bedi",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "8572-6",
        "sire": "Le Havre",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "44.3",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.04",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very useful in this sphere at his peak but it's doubtful he still retains that level of ability, finishing last of six in 2m AW handicap at Southwell back on the Flat last month."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Havana Grey; 110,000gns foal; second (February) foal; dam 5f AW winner (RPR 68), sister to triple 6f Group 1 winner The Tin Man, half-sister to 6f Group 2 winner Deacon Blues, out of 6f/7f winning sister to useful 6f-1m winner Heretic; that's an interesting pedigree and William Buick is handed the reins for this introduction."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "210,000euros yearling by Too Darn Hot; first (early April) foal; dam placed 5f/6f (RPR 70), sister to winners Flying Sparkle (5f 2yo/7f) and Pres Rapide (5f 2yo), half-sister to winners Winter Power (5f Group 1 Nunthorpe) and Hay Chewed (5f Listed), out of 6f 2yo winner; speedy pedigree and she was the most expensive of these at auction; has to be respected for a yard that won this in 2024 and also introduced a winning juvenile here yesterday."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ubettabelieveit 45,000euros yearling; sixth (early March) foal; half-sister to four winners including Forefront (French 6.5f/7f including 2yo; RPR 93), Taritino (7f-1m6f Flat including 2yo, 82; 2m/2m3f hurdle) and Diamont Katie (6f AW; 77); dam 5.5f-7.5f 2yo winner (78); Ryan Moore booked for this debut and yard already off the mark with this year's juveniles; betting to provide some telling clues."

        "spotlight": "95,000gns yearling by Space Blues; second (late April) foal; half-sister to 6f 2yo winner Peel Park (RPR 81); dam 1m3f AW winner (89), half-sister to 6f 2yo Listed winner Straight Answer, out of Group-placed 7f 2yo winning half-sister to 1m2f Group 1 winner Announce; respected yard and market check required on this introduction."

        "spotlight": "60,000gns yearling by Minzaal; third (April) foal; dam 5.7f/6f winner (RPR 89), half-sister to smart 1m-1m6f winner Micro Manage and Listed winners Magnanimous (1m), Thornbrook (1m) and Seisai (7.4f 2yo), out of close relative of 1m4f Group 1 winner Mont Ormel; stable has won two of the last four editions of this and also bagged the Brocklesby last month; a likely type on her first go."

        "spotlight": "Fifth (late March) foal; half-sister to 5f AW 2yo winner Share The Profits (RPR 66); dam 5f 2yo winner (100), half-sister to 5f winner Jonboy, is granddaughter of half-sister to 1m Group 2 winner Inchmurrin (dam of high-class 7f performer Inchinor); first runner for sire Good Effort, who won three Listed races for these connections."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Lady Jemima",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",

        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By St Mark's Basilica; third (early April) foal; dam 6f 2yo winner (including Group 1 Prix Morny; RPR 115), half-sister to Listed-placed 1m4f winner Climate Friendly, out of unraced half-sister to US 1m1f Grade 3 winner Gender Agenda, family of Oaks/St Leger winner User Friendly; slightly mixed messages on pedigree for this debut test but will need a market check."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Progressing well on AW for current yard, recording a second win at Dundalk last month off 61 before solid third there next time; couldn't transfer that form to turf at Bellewstown last time when tailed off (1m4f, soft); perhaps better ground can suit more, but likelihood is that he's better on AW."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third on first two starts before improving to make it third time lucky in maidens at Wolverhampton (7f) in September; while his opening handicap mark isn't obviously generous his useful pedigree provides the hope for further progress; outside stall could be tricky."
      },

        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.15",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept busy as a 2yo with 12 runs, winning a 7f Chester seller (good to firm); left the impression a stiff 1m at Pontefract (soft) just stretched him on final start; this slightly shorter trip could therefore suit on reappearance but he has a much more exposed profile than most; has been gelded."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "9.29",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Advanced her RPR with each start last summer, finishing second of 16 in a restricted novice at York (7f, good) in July; while that York form hasn't really worked out, she still brings unexposed potential to this handicap debut after nearly nine months off; check the betting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lyrical Song (GB)",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 with a second to the reopposing Willowinghurn on 7f Musselburgh handicap debut (soft); may have more to offer in 2026 but the betting is perhaps the best guide as to whether he's likely to be fully primed for this first outing in 196 days (has been gelded)."

        "edge": "-13.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three outings over 6f last year, showing promise when keeping on for close fourth at Carlisle (good) on second start; blew the start at Ayr (soft) four weeks later, so can have that fourth of eight marked up slightly; subsequently gelded; potential improver and one of the more likely types, particularly if backed."

        "fair_odds": "13.39",

        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a fast-ground C&D novice last August and bumped into subsequent Listed runner-up Caim when second under a penalty back here (soft) in September; never involved in a big-field sales race at Newmarket final start but those C&D performances provide hope that she could go well now handicapping after a six-month break."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Registered her second-place finishes behind useful sorts who subsequently ran well in the Fillies' Mile, then posted a good effort on bare figures in French Group 3 (started favourite; again over 1m) on final 2yo run; the form pick."

      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Scored at Lingfield (11.5f, good to soft) on her handicap debut in June and well backed when a fair fifth of 14 over this sort of trip at Newmarket (good) in October; would likely appreciate any rain and she's back on her winning mark for this reappearance."

        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Course winner (7.5f, soft) in 2024 who won two 7f handicaps (soft/AW) last November; blew the start when beating one home (same mark) the following month and absent since; stays this trip, though, and she's not readily dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Catton Lady (GB)",

        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",

        "rpr": "81",

        "fair_odds": "9.10",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept on well to beat Blufferonthebus at Carlisle (her only other win also came there) in June; good effort when second of 11 at Thirsk (also 1m, soft) in September when last seen; also ran well on her return in 2024 but could beat only Dandy's Angel when making her comeback in this race last year; any rain would help and market may guide on this reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Fire Eyes",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",

        "ts": "69",

        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three turf handicaps (1m/7f) in 2025, all in a tongue-tie and the latest with cheekpieces on for the first time; no headgear for either start last month (probably didn't stay 1m2f last time) and the accessories are missing again; back on her last winning mark, though."

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual winner here (1m2f) including when she beat Dandy's Angel on good ground last May; 0-7 subsequently but she went close at Redcar in August and last week's pipe-opener at Pontefract (raced freely) should help; first go at this sort of trip since second of six at Doncaster in June 2024 and she could go well."

        "fair_odds": "15.53",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "12-race maiden but she was in good form when runner-up twice over this sort of trip in October, notably when beaten a neck at Nottingham (good); step up to 1m2f backfired when favourite at Chelmsford (AW) the following month but she's back down in distance for this return; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Quirke On Parole (GB)",

        "trainer": "Mark Walford",
        "ts": "76",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "45.9",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "17.10",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Justified short odds in 1m2f handicap here (good to firm) in June and ran well when second in similar race here next time; didn't see out final two starts last year, so maybe this drop back in trip can assist on her reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Dandy's Angel (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Barry McHugh",
        "trainer": "John Wainwright",

        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "45.8",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.21",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-time course winner (all 1m2f) who goes on any ground and finished second in this on her first start of 2023; 0-10 since her last win in July, however, and she was 50-1 when suffering big defeat on her reappearance in this race last year; nothing wrong with this mark if she is ready to roll."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Appeared to show improved form when fourth of five at Southwell (1m, AW) in September on her final qualifying run; assessor probably hasn't left much to chance but she's the least exposed of these and may be able to have a say on this handicap debut."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Fair form on varied turf as 2yo; rather better in his seven-race campaign at Meydan in December-March, including a 1m win and he shaped as if he stayed 1m1f on latest start; needs to find extra but, unlike most of these, there are no doubts over his fitness."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Minor honours in his three starts on varied ground last summer, before a modest show in 7f novice here in October; could do with settling a little better (made most penultimate start; raced very prominently on latest) on this handicap/seasonal debut but he is bred to stay 1m2f."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close second in a Goodwood maiden (7f, good to soft) and dominant novice win at Salisbury (1m, heavy) were easily best of his five efforts as 2yo; two of the others were in France; needs to resume progress but will stay 1m2f and is one to consider."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed ability on good ground at Newmarket (1m) and Goodwood (1m1f) before his neck second of ten in a novice at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW; made most) in November; will stay 1m2f+; cheekpieces go on and he has what looks a competitive mark for handicap/seasonal debut."

        "spotlight": "Record of 1-28 is off-putting; posted an excellent display from 6lb outside the handicap at Naas on seasonal return when second of 15; let favourite backers down at Navan next time when never better than midfield; hard to trust."

      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in a classified event at Chelmsford (6f, AW) in January but he failed to back that up next time; caught inside the final furlong before finishing fourth of ten there 48 days ago and now attempts 5f for just the second time; visor applied."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Invitorio",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "67-892",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.9",

        "fair_odds": "9.60",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win from 18 starts came in a novice at Redcar (6f, soft) in October 2024; well beaten in his first starts since returning from a break but he came back to form from a career-low mark when second of 12 at Catterick (5f, good) a week ago; that was his first try over 5f and he's contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Windsor last April off a mark 12lb higher than today's and he took a step back in the right direction when a close-up third at Nottingham (5f) a week ago; claims if building on that now returned to the AW."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "19-race maiden but he did have some solid placed efforts on turf at Brighton last year; however, he beat only one rival home at Wolverhampton (5f, AW) when last seen and he may need this first outing for 309 days."
      },

        "rank": 7,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two of his three wins have been over C&D and he was second of eight here in a classified event in February; below his best in two starts since but he may be capable of bouncing back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Alfa Sea Breeze (IRE)",

        "fair_odds": "18.07",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise in her maiden/novice runs (5f-7f) and she had a nightmare passage on her handicap debut at Beverley (5f, good to firm) last July; had a wide trip when down the field here over 6f last month on her first start for 252 days; dropped back in trip with a tongue-tie applied and she may well take a step forward from that effort."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Hi Hoh Tonto (GB)",

        "spotlight": "19-race maiden who was well beaten in four starts for Adrian Wintle last term; didn't shape badly when sixth at Chelmsford on his first start for this stable last month having been off for nearly a year; may come on for that."

      }

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the 17th attempt when winning at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) in September 2024 on his final start for Rebecca Menzies; didn't shape badly here over 1m4f on his stable debut last time having been off for 558 days; may build on that over this longer trip."

        "cd": "",

        "spotlight": "Three wins from 32 starts; unlucky not to go closer when fourth of 11 here over 6f last month but he failed to build on that when seventh here ten days ago; steps back up to 7f."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4yo who only made her debut in December and was off the mark on third start when making all to beat ten others in Newcastle maiden (6f) in February; dropped to 5f and had more in hand than the margin suggests when narrowly winning her first handicap here (first-time tongue-tie) last month; handicapper could only put 1lb on her back and she's of firm interest returned to 6f in the hat-trick bid."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on her first four starts and put it all together when taking Wolverhampton novice (6f, Tapeta) in November; may have more to offer this term and she's respected on this reappearance and handicap debut."

        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built on promising debut (6f, good) in August when landing Wolverhampton novice (Tapeta) three weeks later; back in that form when third in course handicap (also 5f) on final start for George Scott in October and sold for 17,000gns five days later; unexposed, particularly at this trip, and impossible to rule out on this stable/seasonal debut."

        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner who last scored at Kempton (6f) off this mark in September; just edged out at Lingfield (7f, also Polytrack) on penultimate start and finishing last in a classy Newcastle handicap on Good Friday can be glossed over; not without a chance."

      {
        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "11.75",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Possibly significant she was declared to make her debut at Glorious Goodwood in July (non-runner) and scored at 25-1 when finally given the go ahead at Kempton (6f, Polytrack) in September; positives to take from last month's returning second over that C&D, despite the odds-on reversal, and she carries plenty of potential into this handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "70",

        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.40",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "14-1 but she scored on her introduction over C&D in June and defied a penalty in Chelmsford novice (7f, Polytrack) the following month; reverse thrust firmly engaged after that and she didn't beat a rival on her last two starts of 2025; however, she's become attractively weighted and needs a market check ahead of this comeback."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All starts at 6f; won August Newbury maiden (good; form worked out) on her second start and highly tried in two subsequent runs, when down the field in Polytrack Group 3 and Newmarket Listed event; drops in grade for this seasonal/handicap debut and very interesting to see how she goes in the market."
      }
